title: Sign in and reach the dashboard
description: An unauthenticated user can sign in with valid credentials and land on the protected dashboard with lead data visible.

steps.description: Verify the protected dashboard is displayed
Verify lead statistics and a leads list are displayed

title: Blocked access to the dashboard without signing in
description: An unauthenticated visitor who opens the protected route is kept out of the dashboard and sent to sign in.

steps.description: Verify the login page is displayed
Verify the protected dashboard is not displayed

title: Keep access to the dashboard after returning to the app
description: An authenticated user can revisit the app and remain on the protected dashboard with lead data visible.

steps.description: Verify the protected dashboard is displayed
Verify lead statistics and a leads list are displayed

title: Review lead statistics on the dashboard
description: An authenticated user can open the dashboard and see lead statistics alongside the leads list.

steps.description: Verify a leads list is displayed

title: Review the leads list on the dashboard
description: An authenticated user can open the dashboard and see the current leads list populated with lead records.

steps.description: Verify a leads list is displayed
Verify at least one lead record is displayed

title: Edit a lead and see the updated information
description: An authenticated user can update an existing lead from the dashboard and see the saved changes reflected in the lead view.

steps.description: Select a lead from the dashboard
Update the lead details with valid changes
Verify the updated lead information is displayed
Verify the lead remains visible in the dashboard list

title: See validation for invalid login credentials
description: A visitor who submits incorrect credentials sees an authentication error and does not reach the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in password field with invalid-password
Verify an authentication error is displayed
Verify the login page remains displayed

title: See validation when submitting empty login fields
description: A visitor who submits the login form without credentials sees validation feedback and stays on the login page.

steps.description: Verify login validation feedback is displayed
Verify the login page remains displayed
